use sqlx::PgPool;

async fn enrich_orders(pool: &PgPool, order_ids: &[i64]) -> Result<Vec<EnrichedOrder>, sqlx::Error> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for &order_id in order_ids {
        // BAD: SQL query per iteration inside a loop
        let order = sqlx::query_as::<_, OrderRow>(
            "SELECT id, customer_id, total FROM orders WHERE id = $1"
        )
        .bind(order_id)
        .fetch_one(pool)
        .await?;

        let customer = sqlx::query_as::<_, CustomerRow>(
            "SELECT name, email FROM customers WHERE id = $1"
        )
        .bind(order.customer_id)
        .fetch_one(pool)
        .await?;

        results.push(EnrichedOrder {
            id: order.id,
            customer_name: customer.name,
            total: order.total,
        });
    }
    Ok(results)
}

struct OrderRow { id: i64, customer_id: i64, total: f64 }
struct CustomerRow { name: String, email: String }
struct EnrichedOrder { id: i64, customer_name: String, total: f64 }
